Title: Successful login with valid credentials
Preconditions: Backend running; user exists in DB; useMockApi false in environment
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter valid email and password 3. Click login/submit
Expected Result: User is authenticated; redirected to dashboard or home; JWT stored per app design; /auth/me succeeds

Title: Login fails with invalid password
Test Steps: 1. Open /login 2. Enter valid email and wrong password 3. Submit
Expected Result: Remain on login; error message shown; no partial session

Title: Empty email or password validation
Expected Result: HTML5 or app validation prevents submit or shows errors

Title: Logout ends session
Test Steps: 1. Click logout 2. Try opening /dashboard without logging in again
Expected Result: Session cleared; redirect to login or guest state; API returns 401 without token

Title: Access protected route when not logged in
401/403 from API triggers re-auth or message
Test Steps: 1. Use expired token or revoke session 2. Trigger API call
Expected Result: User prompted to login or redirected as designed

Title: Unknown URL redirects
Expected Result: Wildcard redirects to dashboard per routes
